<br /><br /><div align="center" class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; text-align: center;"><b><span style="font-family: &quot;Arial&quot;,sans-serif; font-size: 16.0pt;">Episode 1 - The Tower</span></b><span style="font-family: &quot;Microsoft Sans Serif&quot;,sans-serif; font-size: 8.5pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt;"><br /></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt;"><b><span style="font-family: &quot;Arial&quot;,sans-serif; font-size: 12.0pt;">Stree Noise</span></b><b><span style="font-family: &quot;Arial&quot;,sans-serif; font-size: 16.0pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></b></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt;"><br /></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt;"><i><span style="font-family: &quot;Arial&quot;,sans-serif; font-size: 12.0pt;">Desc: Ash is sitting in a coffee shop when his train of thought is interrupted by commotion outside. He sees beyond the veil into the supernatural realm for a moment, and takes down a homeless man who attacks him. <o:p></o:p></span></i></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt;"><br /></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt;"><br /></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt;"><i><span style="font-family: &quot;Arial&quot;,sans-serif; font-size: 12.0pt;">Notes: Theron Ashland sat sipping on his large mocha java chip frappe', inside the Grounded Cafe', staring out of the window at nothing in particular. Images flashed before his mind, images of wars, actions taken to defend his homeland.<o:p></o:p></span></i></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt;"><br /></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Out of the corner of his eye, through the window </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">outside</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">The Grounded Café</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">, Ash saw two men dressed in black combat gear duck behind a car. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Coolness rushed down his spine, and his muscles tensed. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">He reached for his side arm. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">He shook his head, and looked again, they were gone.<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Post-Traumatic Stress Disorder, PTSD that was the </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">diagnosis</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">they’d</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">assigned</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> him. Ash relaxed and sank back into the leather bound chair; alone, in the corner of his favorite coffee shop. Always keep your back to the wall, be near the most exits, but never too visible. It was like breathing, it never stopped... even in civilian life. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">As Dean of Military Science, Ash's job primarily lay in administrative work and </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">policy</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">these</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> days, plus a few sessions counseling the younger cadets, and would-be trouble makers. He was quite overqualified for the position, but he ran a tight unit. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">He stared at the faces of the </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">pedestrians</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> as they passed </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">by</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">the</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> window. Hurried. Busy. Buried in their smart phones. So oblivious to the world around them, or the little clouds that float around their shoulders.<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">The leaves had begun to fall, most had turned shades of orange and yellow, matching perfectly to the Pumpkins that had been dotting porches and windows through the city the past few weeks.&nbsp; <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Some commotion outside broke his train of thought... Everyone was stopping, turning, and staring in the same direction, a few moving toward the distraction.<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Ash stepped outside to see what was happening, turned a corner, and nearly ran into a bystander. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">A man in a tattered and dirty suit with a graying beard, was standing on top of a pickup truck screaming at no body in particular. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"You always did love Mother best... I know... That's why... You couldn't keep your mouth shut..."<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">On he went, incoherently. Just as Ash took a step closer, the man turned to stare him directly in the eye. Then, in a deeper, gravelly voice: "You... What do you want with us?" </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Then</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">he</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">turned</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">back</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">to</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">his</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">one</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">sided</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">conversation</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">.<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Ash could see a large creature behind the man. The bottom half was more mist than form, as though it were made of smoke. The top half was like a man, with the head of a bull. It was charcoal, and streaks of white painted across the chest. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Ash could feel his palms turn cold, and he felt as though he couldn't move his legs. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">A smaller creature was on the homeless man's shoulders, screaming into his ears. He couldn't hear the conversation, but Ash could tell that the homeless man was responding, and that he had only been hearing one half of the conversation. Ash looked around and nobody else seemed too surprised, as usual.<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">The large </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">creature</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">stared</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">directly</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">at</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Ash</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">, cocked his head to one side and disappeared along with the smaller one. The homeless man was by himself again, then his eyes narrowed. He leapt off the truck, and ran at Ash. It took all his training to keep from being pinned down. The old man was wiry but he was stronger than he looked. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Ash let out a cry, "Jesus!" <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">The wiry man stepped back as though he had been punched. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">That was all Ash needed. In 30 seconds he had the man hog tied with his own belt. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">The police were just arriving. "Charlie's at it again... Let's take him in." <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Three big men in uniform put </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">cuffs</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">and</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> a muzzle on the old man, </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">gave</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Ash</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">his</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">belt</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">, and threw him, rather harshly, into the back of the squad car. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Behind him, someone mentioned: "Those were some moves Marine."<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"Airman. Uh... Thanks. No harm done." Ash noticed his coffee cup crushed, the contents covered the sidewalk, and his jeans.<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"Why don't you let me get you another… on me." <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Ash looked up to see a balding man in </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">blue</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">slacks</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">, </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">matching</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> polo, and a pile of </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">papers</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">in</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">his</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">arms</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"The least I could do for a man who'd be willing to step in to a situation like that, protect all these people. What's your name son?" <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"Ash. I need to get some new clothes. I don't think I need </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">any</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> more caffeine right now. But thanks for the offer." With a waive, he set off toward home.<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Ash headed down the side walk, past the shops and restaurants. There is a girl crying, typing away at the phone. A little red frog on her shoulder, was yell into her ear. Ash could only imagine what it must be saying. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">A little old lady is sitting inside a window at the nursing home. She is knitting something, probably a blanket. A large man in all white, stands behind her, smiling. He looks up at Ash, his smile fades slightly, and then returns. He looks down to her again.<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Ash could not see the figure </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">accompanying</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> each person, only certain ones, here and there. Most were just clouds, or mist.<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"Don't worry so much." His doctor told him, "These may be after affects from the war. As long as they do not interrupt your daily work, or cause you to want to harm yourself </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">or others</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">, you should be fine. Consider yourself lucky. Just think of them as </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">a</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">construct of your active imagination, </span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">an amusing distraction from the mundane realities of life." <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">He turned off the street between two old buildings, and up a well-worn path into the woods, </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">his</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> refuge from the masses, to home. Ash opened the front door. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">It wasn't a mansion by any means, but it was more than sufficient for him. 2,500 sq. ft., 4 bedrooms, a home theater, game room with pool table. Yes sir, he had a fine cabin in the woods. All to himself. How he'd managed to live here eight years and still not have a single friend invited over was a mystery, even to himself. But he liked things just so. He liked the solitude. At least that's what he told himself.<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Ash took a seat on his second story balcony, overlooking the hills and lake. He stared at nothing in particular for several hours. Then he laid down in his hammock, bundled in the overpriced winter resistant sleeping bag. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">As sleep overtook him, he thought to himself "Yes sir, this is one fine cabin."<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">***<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><i><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">An explosion knocks him against a wall. He barely sees, through the smoke, troops running about, hauling rubble off of bodies, checking pulses. Some are screaming in pain. Others shouting to one another. Half the mess hall is completely gone, all that is left is fire and rubble. <o:p></o:p></span></i></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><i><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Ash can feel the beat of his heart in his neck, his forehead rushed with sweat. He sees them all running around, but all he hears is intense ringing. As the numbness subsides from his brain, shock waves hit his chest as more buildings are getting hit nearby. Ash uses the wall to steady himself, and works to stand on his feet.<o:p></o:p></span></i></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><i><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Others will tend to the wounded. This band of Jihadist miscreants found upgraded weapons; Russian no doubt. <o:p></o:p></span></i></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><i><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Ash shoots out the building, down the road to the artillery unit. He grabs his rifle and heads for the highest structure, a radio tower toward the side of the camp. <o:p></o:p></span></i></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><i><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">He can see the launch area where the rockets are being fired from. He takes a few quick breaths, hyperventilating floods the lungs with oxygen, one last deep breath in and hold, steadies his body. Through the scope he can see about 10 of them. They only have two missile launchers. They have very little cover, firing from open desert, mostly hiding behind their Jeep, and a few large outcroppings of fallen mountainside. <o:p></o:p></span></i></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><i><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">He fires two rounds back to back, taking out both missile launchers, one exploding in the handlers face. Ash then begins firing one round after another as the attackers fall like Coke cans on a fence post. The rounds hit their targets with extreme prejudice. <o:p></o:p></span></i></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><i><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Three remain, cowering behind the Jeep. Jeeps are great vehicles for driving through tough terrain quickly, but they are built light, not armored. He sees one peek through the glass, gone. <o:p></o:p></span></i></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><i><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">The other two attempt to climb in the vehicle keeping their heads down and drive away. The problem with that, is that both seats are occupied, both seats are easily identifiable. He doesn't need to see them, only the back of their seats. Two. One. The Jeep speeds up as it drives erratically, then crashes into a mound of rocks. <o:p></o:p></span></i></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Ash woke up... another nightmare, if you can call a memory a nightmare. He rubbed his eyes, and glanced to his wrist. Red numbers flooded his vision, 3:30 am. He rolled over and went back to sleep. <i><o:p></o:p></i></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><br /></div><div align="center" class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; text-align: center;"><b><span style="font-family: &quot;Arial&quot;,sans-serif; font-size: 12.0pt;">***<o:p></o:p></span></b></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt;"><br /></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt;"><b><span style="font-family: &quot;Arial&quot;,sans-serif; font-size: 12.0pt;">Visions<o:p></o:p></span></b></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt;"><br /></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt;"><i><span style="font-family: &quot;Arial&quot;,sans-serif; font-size: 12.0pt;">Desc: Eta has a dream of the white room, wakes up and heads to a cafe' with her friend Janice. She has premonitions that come true. <o:p></o:p></span></i></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt;"><br /></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><i><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; Brightness greeted Eta when she aroused from a drug induced stupor. At least, that's what she assumed as she was coming to, based on the physical effects she was feeling... she must have relapsed again, blacked out... "I wonder what bedroom I've wondered into this time..." she thought to herself. Eta's muscles were sore and she felt the hard surface underneath, it felt cool on her back. It must have been a kitchen floor, maybe tile, or hardwood?<o:p></o:p></span></i></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><i><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">As she squinted, she saw simply bright white... "It must have been one of 'those' parties…", she mumbled to herself as she grimaced past sore muscles to get to her feet. But as the fog cleared she found the resolve to sit up, find her bearings, look around. Something didn't set right. <o:p></o:p></span></i></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><i><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">As her mind rebooted; Eta became keenly aware that nothing was right. This was no frat house, and she wasn't in college anymore. That girl has been dead for many decades, and forgotten. At least she tried to forget. <o:p></o:p></span></i></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><i><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Drawing her groggy attention back to the situation at hand her training started to kick in and she began to assess. There were a large series of L.E.D. lights above, too bright to look directly at. The ceiling was high, too high to reach. The room wasn't very big, square, maybe twenty feet. She realized that her clothes had been changed and she was wearing something akin to a white leotard or bicycle suit, with black trim. <o:p></o:p></span></i></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><i><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">She kind of hoped to keep it when she was out of here, it's nice.<o:p></o:p></span></i></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><i><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Eta scanned the room, no doors, windows, no escape. Only flat walls, she now realized were metal, as far as she could tell. In the center of the room was a white table and one box. She approached carefully and opened the box, assuming this must be the next step in whatever weird situation she'd found herself. <o:p></o:p></span></i></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><i><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"They said training would involve untried methods. Maybe this is a training center and my next assignment. 'Escape the box with no escape "... Well… maybe she wasn't as good at catchy mission names as she was with two Glocks at her side.<o:p></o:p></span></i></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><i><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">When Eta opened the box all she found was a plastic bag, with an iPhone. She turned it on.<o:p></o:p></span></i></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><i><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">It booted silently...<o:p></o:p></span></i></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><i><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">***<o:p></o:p></span></i></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">She woke suddenly, but silently. As though she'd been awake for hours.<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">The only thing weirder than waking from a weird dream, is waking inside of a weird dream, only to then wake from that dream… But that was who Eta was after all… weird was her middle name.&nbsp; Well, ok, maybe not. But it sounded cooler than "Technical Sergeant Nadine Etaine Romanakov", or "Lieutenant" as she was now known by the Colorado Police Department.<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">" 'Eta'... It's pronounced "Eh'---tuh", she'd had to be deliberate in her pronunciation with a probie the other day. He was probably just trying to get to her because of her odd </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">accent</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">or</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">because</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">she</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">was</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">a</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">chick</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">. </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Either</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">way</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> it worked, but he </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">probably</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> wished it hadn't when she was done with him. You don't get </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">to</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">be</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">one</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">of</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">the</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">first</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">females</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">in</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">the</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> USAF </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">to</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">enter</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> combat, or afterward onto the SWAT team, as a female, without being a bit feisty.<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Eta glanced at the bare walls of her studio apartment. Eight years out of the service, and she still hadn't bought a single painting, or decoration for the room. This was not home, there is no home. This was a safe house… an eight year safe house.&nbsp; <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">“Find</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">your</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">happy</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">place</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">girl</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">…” She closed her eyes, and in her mind Eta saw a butterfly land on the window sill. A feeling of warmth flooded over her for just a moment. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Her attention was broken by three short buzzes.<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">The phone, Eta read the words on her screen. "coffee?" <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Janice was the one human odd enough to actually want Eta's company outside of work. And she'd asked for three years before she finally said yes. But now… it was a nice distraction. Maybe, she'd be willing to call Janice a </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">friend</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">?<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">She typed back, "Sure, be there in 10." She strapped on her dual Glocks, rib holstered, and a jacket to cover. You never can be too careful.<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Out the door into the wild white winter madness that is Colorado Springs. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Over at the café, Janice is still chattering away about the latest episode of Blacklist, which Eta is normally very into. Today she just feels less normal. That dream, it had gone away since she'd been doing her herbal teas, but now it was back. Was this a relapse? <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Suddenly, Eta's world disappeared. In her mind's eye, she saw a waiter walk by and trip on her purse, dropping the bottle of Perrier he was carrying, shattering all over the floor, </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">contents</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">pouring</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">over</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">her</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">shoes</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">and</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">spraying</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">up</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">onto</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> Janice’s </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">lap</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">.<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">She turned to Janice who had stopped talking, and was now staring at Eta. “You feeling' ok hun?”<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"I'm fine Janice, sorry… these darn headaches, what were you saying?” Eta denied. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"You need something? I always carry the standards, generic of course… same thing, less money…" <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"Janice, I'm fine, really." Just then a waiter walked by with a bottle of Perrier. He tripped on her purse, and she reached out and caught the bottle before it hit the ground. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"Whoa! Did you see what you just did?” Janice pushed up her glasses. “You have amazing reflexes." She was always expressing how impressed she was with Eta. She worked in Dispatch, but told Eta that she always dreamed of being on SWAT like her. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">&nbsp;"Thank you." the waiter said, and he moved on looking embarrassed. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"Wow girl." Janice said. "You really are good.” Janice went back to recanting the television show. Eta tried her best to appear interested, she actually really enjoyed the show. But these day dreams, or whatever they are, were getting out of control. It wasn't so bad at first. A few harmless day dreams, followed by coincidences. But after eight years, they were getting hard to manage. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Janice glanced over at the TV, a commercial about laundry soap. At the end, a butterfly floats out of the towel and across the room, landing on the window sill.<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"Hmm..." Eta said under her breath. Then, Janice disappeared.<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><i><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Eta was somewhere else, far away. City street. Cars driving by. People walking along, minding their own business, most looking down at screens as if they were walking by GPS. Now there's people running, the streets of roped off, and she can see people in jogging suits, numbers on their back. Then her attention is drawn to a young man placing a backpack in the trash can. She knows this place, but she's never been here. A blinding flash of light. Glass splattering all over her. The percussion hits her chest and…<o:p></o:p></span></i></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">It's over... It's the same day dream she's been having for weeks now. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"Oh my!" she hears from just behind her, she turns to see a couple staring at the bar. Several others are slowly turning to see the television as well.&nbsp; <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"An explosion went off at the Boston Marathon just moments ago…" the reporter covered the information they had so far. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">…wait, did they say Boston? A sick feeling comes over her... is that even possible? </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Glancing</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">at</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> the TV, she sees the young man with the back pack, from her day dream, running away from the scene in the news with all the other people. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Eta folds her head into her hands at stares at the T.V. in total shock. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"What is happening?" Eta whispers. "Excuse me, Janice, I have to make a call. I have friends in that area. I'll see you later ok?" <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Without waiting for an answer, she </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">hurries</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">out</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">the</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">door</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">, </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">then</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> walks to a nearby payphone, which are getting harder to come by these days, keeping her face from a clear line of sight to any cameras she sees. She calls the F.B.I. hotline with an anonymous tip regarding the bomber, and the news channel that had the photo. Then she heads home… to process. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><br /></div><div align="center" class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; text-align: center;"><b><span style="font-family: &quot;Arial&quot;,sans-serif; font-size: 12.0pt;">***<o:p></o:p></span></b></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt;"><br /></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt;"><b><span style="font-family: &quot;Arial&quot;,sans-serif; font-size: 12.0pt;">White Noise<o:p></o:p></span></b></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt;"><br /></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt;"><i><span style="font-family: &quot;Arial&quot;,sans-serif; font-size: 12.0pt;">Desc: Ash has a dream of the white room, wakes up and heads to his coffee shop on the way to work. Runs into Dr. Briar. <o:p></o:p></span></i></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt;"><br /></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><br /></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><i><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; Bright blinding white permeated the room. A white cardboard box sat on a thin snow white metallic table in a small space covered in white painted titanium walls. "How did I get here?” Ash mused to no one in particular. Looking down he noticed the white form fitting uniform he was wearing. His deep tan the only other contrast in this other clinically pure room. A soft hiss was coming from the ceiling, but he couldn’t look up because the ceiling was lit from end to end with bright LED’s, air conditioner maybe. He could barely see around him without squinting. Disorientation started to settle down after the first few moments awake, and he found his bearings. Training kicked in. <o:p></o:p></span></i></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><i><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; Thoughts move to business, take stock. Name/Rank: "Captain Therun Ashland, USAF”, he said out loud. No response. Taking inventory of his body, every part was accounted for, legs, arms, toes, fingers, the scar on his neck under his right ear. No pains, other than the usual. &nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; <o:p></o:p></span></i></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><i><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; Ash tried to recall his last memory before finding himself in this room void of any obvious doors, windows, or openings of any kind, not even a seem was apparent as he circled the room with his eyes and fingers. The thoughts came like rapid fire. He didn’t bother with escape plans, not yet anyway, obviously he'd been handled before arriving here and must be under surveillance this very moment. No way to defend against attack without knowing where the openings are, but there would be no use because if he were going to be killed he would be in some dank prison cell not this white washed room in some overly tailored biking suit. Still, better to be defensive and keep himself against a wall ready to react. <o:p></o:p></span></i></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><i><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; “Bring it in Ash, bring yourself together… What is the last thing you recall? I was on X-Island doing survival training in the South Pacific. I had just dropped in from 15,000 feet. Working through the forest to the hacienda I had retaken the residence and recovered the “stolen” technology, sent it back up on a UAV. Routine training mission. I swam off island to a nearby island and was waiting for my evac. There was a flash of light..."<o:p></o:p></span></i></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><i><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; …that’s it, there was no other memory. He woke up here. <o:p></o:p></span></i></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><i><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; The box on the table was the only thing in the room with him, besides the table itself, which seems to be built into the floor. He approached the table cautiously. Eyes had adjusted some to the light, but there was still not much to see. The legs and table appeared to be built of high strength </span></i><i><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">metal</span></i><i><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">, </span></i><i><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">not</span></i><i><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span></i><i><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">breakable</span></i><i><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span></i><i><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">by</span></i><i><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> hand. </span></i><i><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">The</span></i><i><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> package seemed like any other white shipping box, sealed in white duct tape end to end. <o:p></o:p></span></i></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><i><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; The table was cool to the touch, not cold, but cool, like everything else in this room, floor, walls, etc. Ash pealed at the tape slowly, ready to react to its contents. This box was obviously here for him, it was the only thing in the room, and no-one had reacted to his being awake. Laying the tape aside he opened the lid and found an iPhone, neatly wrapped in plastic. He opened the bag and turned on the phone. <o:p></o:p></span></i></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><i><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; It booted silently… </span></i><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">***<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Ash woke up in a sweat… it was that stupid dream again! The same dream… for 8 years. PTSD came in all shapes and sizes… for Theron Ashland it came in the form of recurring dreams, nightmares really. Some doctors told him it was suppressed memory. Others told him that it was his mind trying to make sense of the missing time. He wasn't sure himself.<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Regaining sleep was unlikely. The clock read 4:07 am. Ash had a few hours before he had to head to the school to start his day full of students’ excuses for misbehaving, and professors’ excuses for their students test results. Things were so much simpler when you could just shoot your enemy. How he ever agreed to accept a position involving people, he'd never understand. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Still, a steady paycheck in post military retirement was more than many Vet's hoped for. Maybe some extra calisthenics would help erase the bizarre and bring him back to reality… again. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">By 6:00 am, Ash was heading to the school for another day, and he stopped off at the Grounded Café for a do-over from last night. As he walked in, Mike, the usual morning Barista </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">nodded</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> "I'll have it right up for you Ash. It's on the house today, thanks for keeping us safe last night man. I heard all about it…" <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Ash nodded back, "Thanks Mike! I'm a little out of practice though… that little old man is stronger than he looks." They both laughed, and Ash took a seat in his favorite leather chair, in his corner. He was skimming through </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">the</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">local</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> paper, when he noticed another man come and sit in the chair beside him. He tried to ignore him, but he could see from his peripheral that the man was just staring straight at him. He couldn't focus to read a single headline, and so he put the paper down on his lap and smiled at the man. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Small stature, balding in the front, large square glasses. "How can I help you mister…?" <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"Briar. Dr. Briar. I was most impressed with your show of heroism last night Airman. I apologize for calling you Marine, I know how you boys like to keep yourselves distinguished from each other. The thing is, I've never seen a member of the Air Force fight like that. Pardon me for saying, but I've always thought of you Airman as more brains than brawn, if you know what I mean." Dr. Briar smiled, warmly. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"No offense taken, I've just had more than my fair share of </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">run</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">-ins, and I've picked a few fights with those Marines you mentioned as well." <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"Tell me Mr. ...." <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"Ash, just call me Ash."<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"Thank you. Tell me Ash, I couldn't help but notice that you were looking at the man rather odd, just before he jumped on you. It was not the face of strange curiosity that most of the bystanders had. There was something… unique... about the way you looked at him? What was that about?" <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Images of the dark cloud, the figure, the small frantic creature danced in his head for a moment. Ash passed it off, "Dr. Briar… </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">is</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">it</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">? I suppose I was just gearing up for the fight. Those of us with training tend to view conflict a bit different from other folks."&nbsp; <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"Ash!" Mike the Barista was calling.<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Turning to Dr. Briar, "Coffee's ready… I have to go to work now." <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"I see… well, thank you for satisfying my curiosity." Dr. Briar stood, and put out his hand. Ash stood, and took it with a firm shake.<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"So long Dr. Briar, nice to meet you."
