Ash grabbed his coffee and headed out the door. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><br /></div><div align="center" class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; text-align: center;"><b><span style="font-family: &quot;Arial&quot;,sans-serif; font-size: 12.0pt;">***<o:p></o:p></span></b></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt;"><br /></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt;"><b><span style="font-family: &quot;Arial&quot;,sans-serif; font-size: 12.0pt;">Leaving CO<o:p></o:p></span></b></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt;"><br /></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt;"><i><span style="font-family: &quot;Arial&quot;,sans-serif; font-size: 12.0pt;">Desc: Eta is on leave, decides to head to L.A. to find the mystery man from her dreams<o:p></o:p></span></i></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt;"><br /></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><br /></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Eta woke up at 9:09 am, as usual. Her day started out normal enough. Then during a raid on a local drug den, she was knocked over by some punk kid who couldn't have been more than 22 years old. He got away! <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in 0in 0.0001pt 4.5pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">How could she have been so careless? Boss Man said that it could happen to anyone, but she knew she wasn't OK. And she let her team down, and a suspect got away. She needed to take time to clear her head, before someone got hurt. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in 0in 0.0001pt 4.5pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">They'd been begging her to use her time off anyway, she'd accrued the stuff for three years straight without using any. So she took a paid leave for six weeks. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in 0in 0.0001pt 4.5pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">That ought to be </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">enough</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"> time for this to pass over... <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in 0in 0.0001pt 4.5pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Or drive her nuts. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in 0in 0.0001pt 4.5pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">One way or the other, this will be settled. </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in 0in 0.0001pt 4.5pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Eta placed her keys on one of the hooks by the door, and her purse on the other. If you can call a kevlar fanny pack a purse. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in 0in 0.0001pt 4.5pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">She locked the dead bolt, three times. Set the alarm code, 3. 3. 3. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in 0in 0.0001pt 4.5pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Eta glanced to the inspirational photo of a waterfall, framed on the wall, a constant reminder, <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in 0in 0.0001pt 4.5pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">"Nine represents achievement and completion, when all has been put right, and in order. Order is control. Control is power. Power is defense. Master Xua Chi".<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in 0in 0.0001pt 4.5pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Defense against the world, people, but mostly, herself. Self cannot be trusted. Above all else, self must be controlled. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in 0in 0.0001pt 4.5pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Eta glanced the place over, everything is where she left it. Windows and doors secure. Sounds correct. Smells check. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in 0in 0.0001pt 4.5pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">She let out a sigh, shoulders relaxed. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in 0in 0.0001pt 4.5pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Glocks, still holstered, were placed on the bed, under the pillow. Eta walked to the kitchen, poured hot water into a teacup, then parked herself at the desk by the window. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in 0in 0.0001pt 4.5pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">The desk was close enough for light and fresh air, but just out of the line of sight from other tall buildings and potential sniper nests. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in 0in 0.0001pt 4.5pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">She rotated the blinds, so that no one could see in. The screen came to life, the cursor blinking in the long rectangular box. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in 0in 0.0001pt 4.5pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Eta tried searching, "visions", "psychic". Every search brought with it a rabbit trail of charlatan websites looking to make money off of the unsuspecting fools who dared to believe their trickery. No real science. No exploration. Nothing to explain her situation. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in 0in 0.0001pt 4.5pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">"What is happening to me?" Eta sighed. The sights and sounds of the bombing were fresh in her mind. The news channels didn't do it justice. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in 0in 0.0001pt 4.5pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">She'd been there... somehow. She could smell the explosive materials, she could see the bombers face when he put the backpack in the trash can. He was frightened, not bold. He looked at the people around him so sadly. Then he walked away, head down, crying.<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in 0in 0.0001pt 4.5pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">They caught him this morning, thanks in part to her tip off, she hoped. He looked surprised on the T.V. Like he didn't know how he'd been caught. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in 0in 0.0001pt 4.5pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">This does not bode well for the order she'd crafted for her life. There had to be logical rational answers for this phenomena. Or was this just the past catching up with her. Something finally snapped inside, and she'd gone nuts afterall? <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in 0in 0.0001pt 4.5pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">After hours of nothing concrete coming up in the searches, Eta closed the laptop lid, and sat back in the chair. She rubbed her neck, and eyes. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in 0in 0.0001pt 4.5pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">They burned, she must have forgotten to blink again. Eta laid down on the bed, and stared at the ceiling until sleep overtook her. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in 0in 0.0001pt 4.5pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><i><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">She's late for an appointment. What appointment? She doesn't know. She's just sitting here in the food court, with her laptop, waiting for... someone? The sign on the wall says Sky Mall. <o:p></o:p></span></i></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in 0in 0.0001pt 4.5pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><i><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">She's been here a while, she's not sure how long. Time ticks on, clicking away on the keyboard, search after search brings no relief. <o:p></o:p></span></i></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in 0in 0.0001pt 4.5pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><i><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">She looks down and there are lockers. A man walks up, black jeans, black jacket with a Carhart logo, grey beany. He opens the locker, and pulls some things out.<o:p></o:p></span></i></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in 0in 0.0001pt 4.5pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><i><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Just as he is about to turn around, there is a flash of bright light, and he is gone. No bomb this time, he's just gone. She needs to meet him. But why? <o:p></o:p></span></i></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin: 0in 0in 0.0001pt 4.5pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><br /></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Eta sat up. Had she been asleep? Not sure. Another vision? She'd pulled her last $3,000.00 </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">from savings</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">, on the way home last night. She'd planned to drop by the airport and take the first one way flight to anywhere but here. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">A few taps on the keys revealed a Sky Mall in Los Angeles California. Ten minutes from Union Station, and L.A.X. Perfect, she could walk from the airport. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"I guess L.A. counts as 'anywhere but here'..." Eta said. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Janice was more than willing to drop her off on one condition. "Take pictures, and bring me back an amazing story of your adventures! And if it's boring... Just make something up for me!" <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">She looked out the plane window, it wasn't as impressive without the thrill of a parachute strapped to your back. Eta closed her eyes, and sleep came, eventually. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><br /></div><div align="center" class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; text-align: center;"><b><span style="font-family: &quot;Arial&quot;,sans-serif; font-size: 12.0pt;">***<o:p></o:p></span></b></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt;"><br /></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt;"><b><span style="font-family: &quot;Arial&quot;,sans-serif; font-size: 12.0pt;">Terminate<o:p></o:p></span></b></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt;"><br /></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt;"><i><span style="font-family: &quot;Arial&quot;,sans-serif; font-size: 12.0pt;">Desc: <o:p></o:p></span></i></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt;"><br /></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Dr. Briar watched Ash leave, as he sat back down to his tablet at the table in the back of the Café. He stared down at his screen, which showed vital signs playing alongside a recording of the event as it had unfolded the night before. Dr. Briar pulled up the private Instant Message, and began typing. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Note: Subject A reacted to the white noise, even 10 years after the end of his experiment. Elevated vital signs, and increased erratic behavior were nearly instant. Subject B showed signs of elevated vitals, but he was attacked, which could be the reason. Subjectively, I feel he saw something; however, even after my interview with him this morning, the data was inconclusive. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; Status Recommendation:<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; Subject A: Terminate.<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; Subject B: Observe.<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Dr. Briar pressed enter, and took a sip of his Carmel Macchiato. For a few minutes the cursor remained empty, blinking on the screen as he watched the sea of humanity passing by. If they only knew… is this what it was like for the dinosaurs? Just roaming about their territory, eating and pursuing each other until one day… an explosion changed everything?<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">One of his experiments had managed to ellude them, despite their precautions. The frustrating part, was that despite his vast resources, and well paid hackers, this experiment remained elusive. They knew who they had thought he was. Until they realized that the person they thought they had, didn't exist. By then it was too late. He'd shown great promise during the experiments. His brain scans were clean. Text book case study. The only problem was that he didn't exist. When they went to find him for a check-in, he was missing, and the alias turned out to be empty. Ryan Wrecking never existed. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">They couldn't find him, but they could put a stop to the madness before it got any further out of hand. Already they'd eliminated 25 of the most extreme cases, the ones gone wrong, the liabilities. They must put a lid on this mess before there was any more exposure to the program. A message popped up. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; Assign: <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; Subject A: Terminate.<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; Subject B: Terminate.<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Dr. Briar may have been many things, but he was assuming that taking the life of a man who was not showing signs of being a danger to himself or others was just beyond his moral line. He responded. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; With sadness, he resigned himself to the inevitable. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; Understood.<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Dr. Briar suddenly felt ill. It's hard to imagine that just a few short years ago, he'd been a respected scientist. Sure, he worked on the fringe of science. But how had he come to this? Reduced to putting down his own test subjects? This was the price he'd paid to touch the edges of the known universe and rip them open. This was the price he'd paid to have his funding needs met by an "interested party". Only too late did he realize, too interested. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><br /></div><div align="center" class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; text-align: center;"><b><span style="font-family: &quot;Arial&quot;,sans-serif; font-size: 12.0pt;">***<o:p></o:p></span></b></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt;"><br /></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt;"><b><span style="font-family: &quot;Arial&quot;,sans-serif; font-size: 12.0pt;">Negative Noise<o:p></o:p></span></b></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt;"><br /></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt;"><i><span style="font-family: &quot;Arial&quot;,sans-serif; font-size: 12.0pt;">Desc: Ash dreams of the dark room, wakes up and he's attacked. He needs to leave town for saftey, and find out what's happening. Why the attack, and why the dreams, and what was with that homeless guy?<o:p></o:p></span></i></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt;"><br /></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><br /></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; The iPod had given short but clear instructions. &nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; "Col Ashland. You are in no danger. We are conducting an experiment in sound waves and sound deprivation. After a cleansing period to be determined, you will be ushered into another room. You are to sit in the chair for another period of time, also to be determined. That is all. Within a few weeks, you will leave no worse for the ware, unless this works. In which case, you will be better for the ware." &nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; That was all it said. The one and only track, ended.<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; It was always bright. The lights never turned off. It may have been 10-15 days? He was trying to keep marking the days on the white box, but he could not tell when one day started, and another ended. </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">With</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">no</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">natural</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">light</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">as</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">reference</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">, </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">his</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">circadian</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">rhythms</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> w</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">ere</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">off</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">. Ash wakes to the sound of his food being delivered for breakfast, </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">fold</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">, </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">his</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">only</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">measuring</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> stick. He eats in silence. He doesn't even hear the static from above anymore<span style="background: yellow; mso-highlight: yellow;">.</span> When he is done he places his tray on the shelf and it disappears into the wall again.<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; *Click* The <span style="background: yellow; mso-highlight: yellow;">sound</span> in the overhead turns off. "Well… that's new." Ash said the first words he'd spoken in days. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; The air pressure changes as a slight crack in the wall snaps open. The crack opens wider as the panel disappears into the wall. *Whoosh*, the crack becomes a doorway, which opens into a long hall. Since this is the first interaction he's had since he woke up in the looney bin, he decided it was better to investigate the new, than stay in the old. Ash makes his way down the long hall, lit with blue LED's </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">this</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> time.<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; He makes his way into a room, approximately 15 by 15. The door shuts behind him. The floor is built from a hatch work of solid wire. Very sturdy; however, unnerving as you can see several feet beneath the floor which is covered in deep triangular </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">foam</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">, </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">of</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> <span lang="EN">various </span></span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">sizes</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">and</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> depths. The walls, ceiling, all made of the same substance. One chair, bolted to a frame on the floor. It looks comfortable enough. Like a dentist chair. Seeing no other option, he takes the chair. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; Upon taking his seat, the lights are turned off. The only thing Ash could see was the flashes of white dots dancing around his eyes from having been in the light moments earlier.<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; The silence is deafening. Ash clapped his hand once, and noticed that the clap was hallow, as though the walls took the sound and sucked it out away from him, then wouldn't give it back. If it were possible for sound to be less than nothing, this was it. The sound was sucked right out of him, so that all he could hear was his own breathing. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">After</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">about ten minutes, his</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> ears began ringing. It started subtle, but grew worse. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; When the ringing subsided, he could hear the beating of his own heart, and the sloshing of bodily fluids throughout his own body.<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; Having spent the last several days in what he would have called silence, all of Ash's racing thoughts had subsided. He's moved past wondering where he is, when he'll leave, he's now just him. Alone with his thoughts. And increasingly, his past.<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; He could almost hear his own thoughts. As though that voice in his head, that was always present, telling him what to do, and where to go, and how to act, watch out for that... don't say that... oh man, what did you do that for? It was as though the inner voice became almost audible. As though he could hear himself think. Or rather as though his thoughts could speak to him audibly. It was an odd sensation, but occupying his mind was the only thing he could do. He'd never admit it to a captor, but solitary confinement was his favorite part of being a prisoner of war. He enjoyed self-time, silence. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Now</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">though</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">, alone in the dark now, with no sound of any kind, negative sound. He sits. Lays back in the reclining dentist chair, and he waits. He waits. Eventually, after what seemed like hours, Ash started to fall asleep. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; He did not know how long he'd been asleep, but his concentration suddenly snapped into focus with the feeling that he was not alone in this room. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; He'd known before he entered the room that cameras were on him, and he was being observed... but that wasn't it. He felt the air in the room change, as though someone had entered the room with him. He could hear breathing in the room. He wasn't tied to the chair, he could get up, but where to? He couldn't see, he'd memorized the layout though. He knew the entrance he came from, and he didn't see any other known entry ways before the door shut out the light. Ash slowed his breathing, and observed with his four remaining senses for any clue as to the whereabouts, and intention, of the new participant. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; "Ash..." a voice whispered from all around him.<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; "Ash... " He sits up. How long was he asleep? Is he asleep now? How would you know in dark silence?<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; "Ash... we know about you Ash... We know who you are... Fraud! </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Failure</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">! </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Hypocrite</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">!" The voices were filled with pain, and anger.&nbsp; <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Ash shakes his head... the voices vanish. For the first time since entering this crazy place, Ash felt fear creep into his spine. Those voices… they almost sounded like… them. Images flashed through his mind of the wars he'd fought, the people he'd killed for God and country. Was it for God? Who's god? The god of good oil prices? What country? The one that left him to rot in an Iranian prison, because we could not admit we had been there to begin with? </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Disavowed</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">they</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">called</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">it</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">. </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Escape</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">required</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">cruel</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">and</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">unusual</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">punishment</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">of</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">his</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">captors</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">, </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">even</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">for</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">him</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">.<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Through the silence a buzzing grew steadily... startling him<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; Bzz. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; Bzz. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Ash woke up. Still in his hammock. He pulled his phone from the pocket of his jacket next to him. 3:17 am, 10 new messages from the same unknown number. He opened the messages, and they all read the same. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"ATTACK IS IMMINENT!!!!”<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Ash felt his senses come alive, 25 years of drills and real life base attacks had drilled that message into his DNA. His focus came alive, and his hearing and sight became acute. Ash steadied his breath. He didn't move, not yet, he wanted to know what direction? What attack? In Oregon? Really? He started to assume that this was a prank being pulled by one of the new cadets. He got out of the hammock and walked to the kitchen to get some water. He still didn't feel right though. Something was off. He placed the glass on the counter and… <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Ash heard </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">the</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> front door open, and then close softly. It could be a prank, and if so, he didn't want to accidentally shoot one of his students. At the same time, 10 messages is enough to put him on edge, so he quietly pulled his side arm from the drawer, but holstered it in the back of his pants. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">He also grabbed his </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">custom</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> Survival Knife from the drawer.<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Ducking down behind the island, he used the glass reflection to watch the hallway. Two men entered the hallway, geared up in all black, using </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">professional</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Russian</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> hand signals. They moved silently, and they were built for battle. These were no students. Ash watched as they made their way to the porch, where his hammock still looked like it was being slept in. Intended to fool students pulling a prank, but just as handy when being attacked for real. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">He started to rise, so that he could work his way to a better defensive position, then a bright light made him pull back. He couldn't see anything for a few moments. When the light </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">cleared</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">, he could see the men on the porch as they approached the hammock, and then opened fire on it. Ash holstered his knife, and went back to his side arm. He took several shallow breaths, followed by one deep breath, steadied his focus. He could see the hammock, and its contents falling apart. He stood, worked quickly to get behind the couch, which he had special made for just such an occasion. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">You never can be too paranoid... or is that prepared? He could never tell the difference. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">He crouched behind, on one knee, fired several shots into the nearest target. The assailant flailed forward into his counterpart and then went over the balcony. Stunned by the commotion, the other remaining member turned to see where the shots came from, too late. Ash emptied the remaining rounds and he went down. Ash re-loaded, and approached with caution. He kicked the weapon aside, and checked for life in the assailant. DOA. A glance over the edge revealed no change of survival there either. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Ash stripped the man of anything useful, then picked up him up, and threw him off the balcony to hang out with his friend. Ash grabbed the man's rifle, and swept the house for more.&nbsp; Clear. This was an AN-94, advanced Russian assault rifle, way too expensive for general issue to the Russian military or police. This was a special breed that had the balls to enter his house. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Who sent them? What in the world did they want with a retired professor? Surely it can't be a grudge from his special forces days? That was over eight years ago, then again, people like Ash never really retire. They just go dormant, to be pulled back in a moment's notice. Which is why he still had a Commanding Office (C.O.) to report to quarterly. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">When he knew the coast was clear, he called his C.O. to report the incident. No reason for the civilians of this sleepy town to know that there had been a Russian attack on US Soil, they'll send a sanitation team to make it look like it never happened. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"General Akbar… Sir this can't be an isolated incident. I need to go dark and find out what's going on." <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"Understood Ash. Check in every two weeks, and we'll see what we can find on our end. We'll let the school know we called you into active duty on short term notice. They won't ask any questions. And Ash… be careful. I don’t like the smell of this one." <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"Roger. I'll check </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">back</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> in two weeks." <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Ash threw together his hiking pack, and necessities. He pulled his cash from the </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">stow</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">-away hidden </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">in</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> the back of the couch. He took one last glance at his cabin, now a little less beautiful than before… sighed, and walked out the door. The sanitation team would be here before light. And he needed to be gone by then too. Ash pulled the bike out from the garage. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">He didn't ride the Vulcan often, but he really enjoyed it. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">He</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> really did need </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">to</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">get</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">out</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> more, even if it </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">takes</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">people</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> looking to assassinate </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">you</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">, </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">to</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">get</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">you</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">out</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">of</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> town. He glanced both directions. He'd set up safeties in Washington and California. "Heck, let's make like the birds and head south for the winter", he stated. He pointed the nose down the road, and took off. Making sure to keep to back roads, but ones with multiple exit paths. "Russians…" he pondered, "what do the <span style="background: yellow; mso-highlight: yellow;">Russians</span> want?" <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><br /></div><div align="center" class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; text-align: center;"><b><span style="font-family: &quot;Arial&quot;,sans-serif; font-size: 12.0pt;">***<o:p></o:p></span></b></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt;"><br /></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt;"><b><span style="font-family: &quot;Arial&quot;,sans-serif; font-size: 12.0pt;">React to Ash "escaping"<o:p></o:p></span></b></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt;"><br /></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt;"><i><span style="font-family: &quot;Arial&quot;,sans-serif; font-size: 12.0pt;">Desc: <o:p></o:p></span></i></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt;"><br /></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><br /></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Dr. Briar pulled up the private Instant Message, and began typing. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; Subject A: Terminated<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; Subject B: Termination Failed, Escaped, On the run. Cannot find him. Lost two units.<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">There was a long silence. Butterfly's flew around in his belly, and his hands grew cold. The Benefactor, as he was called, did not take kindly to failure; however, he was also a cold calculator. He was hard, but not rash. As long as Dr. Briar was still valuable he would not receive his direct wrath.<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; Return, regroup.<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">A wave of relief washed over him. He was still valuable, for now. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; Heard<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">He picked up his phone, and pressed speed dial. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">"Welcome to Esion, this is Clara speaking, how may I help you?"<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">"Clara, this is Dr. Briar. Get my plane ready, I'm leaving in one hour... Oh, and hire two more assistance, I seem to have lost mine."<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">"Yes sir Dr. Briar, right away." He pressed the big red disconnect button, and sat in the cafe for a few moments, pondering his next moves. He would not be allowed to fail again. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><br /></div><div align="center" class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; text-align: center;"><b><span style="font-family: &quot;Arial&quot;,sans-serif; font-size: 12.0pt;">***<o:p></o:p></span></b></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt;"><br /></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt;"><b><span style="font-family: &quot;Arial&quot;,sans-serif; font-size: 12.0pt;">Mystery Man<o:p></o:p></span></b></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt;"><br /></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt;"><i><span style="font-family: &quot;Arial&quot;,sans-serif; font-size: 12.0pt;">Desc: Eta is pursueing a vision of a man at a locker, she has to find him. It turns out, he's her old partner from spec ops, Ash.<o:p></o:p></span></i></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt;"><br /></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">The Los Angeles Sky Mall was bustling with humanity, roaming about like so many ants building a colony without knowing why. Eta sat in the food court tables just outside the Chick Filet, overlooking the railing down to the first floor, in perfect view of the lockers. She couldn't get the latest vision out of her head. After that incident a few weeks ago with the Boston Marathon, she was officially freaking out. Then this new vision started up. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">She's sitting in this exact spot, and a some guy in black jeans, a black jacket with a Carhart logo, and a grey beany steps up to a locker, he turns around ... Vision Over.<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"I'm not sure who this guy is" she said to no one "... or why I </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">used</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> my vacation time on short notice and </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">the</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">last</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">of</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> my </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">emergency</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">fund</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> to fly out to Los Angeles to sit in this chair. All I know is, if he has any clues, about why I'm seeing stuff before it happens, it's worth a shot to come find out." Eta shook her head, "You're talking to yourself again girl, get a grip…" <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">So she waits… and waits. She's been here all day, every day with her laptop surfing the Wi-Fi... waiting. She's had only this vision, every night, for two weeks since the Boston Bombing. So here she sits, waiting. Day 12… hotels and fast food. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Bouncing from site to site, Google providing no solid answers, she's now attempting to use the other search engines, hoping for different results. She's hit up Bing, Yahoo, DuckDuckGo... she's moved on to deep web searches. Checking out the Library of Congress, National Security Archive, Virtual Library, Infomine... grasping for answers. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">There were a few articles about paranormal studies and research. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Did she hear voices? No. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">See things she can't explain? Yes. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Did she have the feeling she was being watched by a close loved one? No. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">She laughed so abruptly a few people turned around to look at her for a moment. The thought was hilarious. There were articles about people coming back from war with strange mental reactions, and being misdiagnosed with PTSD. Paranormal research was hard to wade through, for every non-biased scientific evaluation, she found 1,000's of kooks and quacks that ranged from television psychics to religious evangelists. All of them wanting to provide you with answers, for the low cost of... or a love gift of... <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Eta was on her fourth cup of Venti Soy Chai Tea Latte for the day when she saw him. Out of the corner of her eye, there was a man with dark blue jeans, nearly black. A black jacket with a Carhart label on the shoulder, and a grey beany... he was headed in the direction of the </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">lockers. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">She gasped. Pulse quickened, muscles tensed.</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Eta</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> tried to look casual, in case he turned her direction. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">If Special Forces training had taught her anything it was how to observe without being seen. He was headed straight for the locker... and then passed it, and headed out of </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">sight</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">down</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">the</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">halls</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">to</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">the</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> bathrooms. She wouldn't have the time to get down there and follow, and the vision was about this locker, so she decided against her inner desire to pursue and kept up with her searches. If that was the guy, he'd be back. If it wasn't, she'd miss the real person she was here to see. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">More searches turning interesting tidbits of useless data. It's a decent distraction, but she's no closer to the answer. Eta stares into the crowds below as they meander through the mall. Out of the corner of her eye she sees the man again, walking away from the lockers. He disappears underneath her, toward the exit. She sits debating, "Should I go follow, or stay and wait?" She decides that the vision has her in this seat, and him at that locker. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"Hello Ms.?" <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Eta is startled by a young man holding a heart shaped box. "Yes?" <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"This is for you, have a great day", the young man starts to take off. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"Wait, sir… this can't be for me." He turns back to face her. "I don't know anyone here. You got the wrong person." <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"No Ma'am. You are the one. He pointed to you, black leather jacket, laptop, purple hair.
