He said to give this to you." he turned and walked away. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Eta looked around, she felt the icy tinge run through her spine. She could feel her breathing quicken, and her skin tighten. Glancing in through the crowd, she could not locate any immediate danger. Eta put her ear to the box to listen for mechanical devices. It was light, too light to be a bomb. She opened it, and there was a note inside. "Why did you open this box? Haven't I taught you anything? Gotcha! Over Please." She recognized the hand writing instantly. "Hey there slugger! Nice avoidance technique, almost didn't notice you there. What are you doing here?"&nbsp; It may have been eight years, but they were partners for longer than that. She stood up, glancing around. She didn't see him. She looked toward the locker, there he was. The man in the black jacket pulled a backpack from the locker, and turned around. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"Of all the crazy… ", she said. Her muscles relaxed. Eta folded her arms, feigning annoyance, and nodded her head calling him over. The she sat down. She took a deep breath, and sighed. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Ash walked up to her, smiling. He'd aged well. "Time has been hard on you, huh tough guy?" <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"It's done wonders for you slugger. Look at you". He sat down. He recanted his ordeal in Oregon, and his trip down here to pull his backup safety stash of money, weapons, and passports. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">She recanted her pre-cognitions and experiences in Colorado. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">When they had both finished explaining: <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Psychic</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> precognition… huh? Weird." <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"I'd have taken your Russians over my </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">psychotic</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> breakdown, more predictable." <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"I guess so. What do we do now?"<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"I don't know. I've been searching for answers, Google has been most helpful. Did you know I could have latent Psychic Tendencies?" She smiled. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"Really?" Ash put on his best serious face. "Well… let's get you’re your own program!"<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">They</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">both</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">chuckled</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">.<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"So Chief, what's the plan now?"<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"I don't know, but I do know we'll need someplace to crash tonight. You have any visions of a 5 star hotel in our future? We can't use credit cards, got to stay off the grid." <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"No. The last vision was of you standing there at that </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">locker</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">, </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">of</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">course</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">I</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> didn’t </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">know</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">it</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">was</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">you</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">at</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">the</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> time. Fresh out of visions for the moment…. Wait… it's coming in now…"<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Ash sat up a little straighter, after his fight with the homeless man he was open to strange possibilities. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"I see you, and me… sleeping in a cardboard box!" Ash slouched a little, and shook his head. "Hey, I spent </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">most</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">of</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">my</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">emergency</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">fund</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">and</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">this</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">wild</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">goose</span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;"> </span><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">chase</span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">, getting to this dump of a city."<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"Well, we can't stay here. But I think I can afford someplace better than a cardboard box."<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">They both got up, and took off together on the bike, through the streets of LA. They parked the Vulcan in an Alley, then went to Denny's for a bite to eat. You can always count on Denny's when you are operating on a budget. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><br /></div><div align="center" class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; text-align: center;"><b><span style="font-family: &quot;Arial&quot;,sans-serif; font-size: 12.0pt;">***<o:p></o:p></span></b></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt;"><br /></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt;"><b><span style="font-family: &quot;Arial&quot;,sans-serif; font-size: 12.0pt;">Dissonance<o:p></o:p></span></b></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt;"><br /></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt;"><i><span style="font-family: &quot;Arial&quot;,sans-serif; font-size: 12.0pt;">Desc: Ash and Eta run into Chester in an alley being harrased by a gang. They dismantle that group, and Chester takes them to a safe place.<o:p></o:p></span></i></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt;"><br /></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Before they could make it into the front door, Ash heard something, and motioned for Eta to follow, making their way to the alley beside Denny's. As they rounded the corner they heard voices, and they didn't sound pleasant. Curiosity got the better of Ash who peaked into the alley to assess the situation. Eta made a grumpy face, but followed. "Ash" she whispered, "we're trying to stay off the grid. Let's not get in the middle of something we'll need to explain to police." He motioned to keep her voice down, and glanced around the corner. Three… no four, Latino men, armed with hand guns. All dressed in sagging jean shorts, white ribbed under shirts, and button down plaid, with only the top button together. Blue bandanas wrapped around their arms.<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"Chester, Chester… it's been a long time since we've seen you around boy? You ain't buying no more, or what?" The smallest guy was doing the talking. Shaved head, snake tattoo on his neck running up and over his skull. "You still owe us that program you promised boy. The one that would get us into people's accounts. Where'd you disappear to essay?!" Turning to the chunky guy on his left, "Gordo, what's it been, two… three years since we've seen this punk? Since he promised us a program in exchange for our merchandise? I think it's time to pay up Sancha!" <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Ash could see the shadowy figures rising up and around the four guys. Never quite solid, but so often present in situations like these, with shady people. Then a light caught his eye. He noticed the gleam first, and then the whole scene exploded into bright light. Ash backed away, temporarily blinded. After a few blinks, he could see a very large man, brown hair, dressed in all white, with a gold belt and long sword. He was standing behind the victim, but looking straight at Ash. He smiled, motioned to the four assailants, nodded approval, and then… disappeared again. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Ash motioned to Eta. Four assailants. Armed. One victim. Cover me, from over there. I'm going in. Eta pulled her side arm, and sighed. "Really?" she whispered, "I took vacation time to come to LA and shoot gangsters?"&nbsp; Eta silently made her way to just behind the parked car. She stayed in the shadows between the car and the wall, but kept her side arm pointed at the group. Ash adjusted his chest holster within easy reach of his slightly open jacket, and walked down the alley as though he didn't see the crowd. They were so busy they didn't see or hear him as he approached. He walked right up next to the largest of the bunch and stood there for a while. They were so busy being bully's they didn't even notice him. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Amateurs. Tired of being ignored; "Fellas, what's with the party!?" he screamed out with his best impression of a loud drunk. Snake head whipped around, followed by everyone else. Tiny looked the most surprised, which made sense considering the guy was standing right next to him and he didn't notice. Snake head put on his best bravado stance. "You lost boracho? I think you need to move along… " <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"Why? I was just leaving the bar and my friend had disappeared. I was looking all over for you buddy, where did you go?" Motioning at the victim. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Snake head didn't give him time to respond. "You have 60 seconds to leave, before you become a part of this party amigo… and trust me, you don't want to be a part of this party." <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Ash straightened up a little, still putting on a drunk show. "I'll tell you what amigo…." He swallowed. "I'll give you and your friends 10 seconds to leave this alley before I ruin your party and take my friend with me." <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Snake head had enough; "Tiny… get rid of this guy, huh?" Tiny pointed his gun at Ash's head… and the world slowed down. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Ash moved in to Tiny's space, pushing the gun away from this body, stepped on his toes, pulled his knee into the opposite inner thigh, simultaneously taking his gun, and hitting him in the nose with the butt of the gun. With one big shove he knocked Tiny into the guy behind him and they both went down. Ash whipped around, in two quick strides and hit the third guy in the throat so hard that he dropped his gun and went down to the ground with both hands on his neck trying to breathe. Finally, he side stepped to Snake Head, and with one hand took Snake Head’s gun hand and held it pointed to the ground, and with the gun he'd just taken from tiny, and pointed it right between his eyes. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">By this point two of the assailants were still nursing wounds while the third had recovered and was starting to point his weapon at Ash. Just then the gun flew out of the guys hand, as a faint swoosh could be heard from down the alley. He grabbed his hand in immense pain as it was now bleeding profusely.<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Ash, no longer pretending to be a drunk, looked Snake Head directly in the eye. "So here's how this goes. A) you and your friends leave your weapons in the alley and take your friend to the hospital to have his hand looked at. B) you all leave here in body bags as my friend back there picks you off like ducks at a carnival shooting gallery."<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Snake Head hesitated for a few moments, then dropped his gun, as did the others. The four of them ran out of the alley, right past Eta who stayed hidden so they wouldn't see where she'd fired from. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Ash picked up the weapons and put on the safeties before loading two into his belt. He threw the others to Eta who had come down the alley by now, sure that the four had left for good. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"You're getting rusty old man."&nbsp; Eta half smiled. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Ash returned a smirk and then turned to their new friend. "You have a name kid?" <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"Chester…" he managed, a bit shaken from the encounter. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"Well Chester, we'll need to get moving before they gather the courage to return with the rest of their gang, or police come after someone reports the commotion. Anyplace you know that we can go and be safe from them, and the police for that matter?" Ash said.<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"And maybe some food?" Eta shrugged, "This kind of interrupted our dinner plans."<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"Yeah… sure… this way…" Chester motioned to the street and the three of them left the alley. They made their way to the Union Gospel Mission. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Chester waived to the night guard, "Albert. These two are with me."<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"OK, sounds good. Just sign them in Mr. Chester." The guard was older, he looked like he could hold his own, but he wasn't going on any marathons any time soon either. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"Who were those guys?" Eta asked as they ate a free meal. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"It's a long story. Suffice it to say that they were part of a life I no longer live. By the way, not that I'm not grateful… but where did you two learn to do that CIA, Kung Fu, Ninja stuff back there?" <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Eta and Ash glanced at each other and smiled. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"It's a long story…" Ash stated. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Chester smiled. "I see what you did there."<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Eta kept her eyes on the doors and windows. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Chester followed her glance, "Well hey, seriously, if you want to avoid prying eyes, the mission might not be the best place for you two to stay tonight. Most of the residents are long term bums, and are still discussing the conspiracy behind the Kennedy assassination, or Roswell. But we do get a few savvy's in now and then, and if your faces are on the news or anything, they might know. They'd take the opportunity for a tip line reward." Chester glanced at the wall for a moment, and turned back to them. "Why don't you stay at my place? It's big enough."<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"Are you sure it's a good idea to invite total strangers to your house Chester?" Ash put up his hands, "Not that I mind." <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"Listen. Strange you are. Weird…. Maybe even a little scary. But two people who would walk into an alley to save a guy they don't know with super cool Ninja moves like that, and then let the crooks live? If you meant me harm, we wouldn't be here right now. Besides… there's something about you… I can't put my finger on it, but I feel like we were meant to meet tonight, and I always trust my gut. It’s always done me right. Besides it's the least I can do after you risked your lives to save me. Win-Win in my book." <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"Good enough for me. It's a viable option. What do you say Eta?"<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"Less cameras to avoid at his place than the hotels" she shrugged,” Better plan than any". <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">They wrapped up their dinner, and Chester waived to Albert, and the three headed to his place. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><br /></div><div align="center" class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; text-align: center;"><b><span style="font-family: &quot;Arial&quot;,sans-serif; font-size: 12.0pt;">***<o:p></o:p></span></b></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt;"><br /></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt;"><b><span style="font-family: &quot;Arial&quot;,sans-serif; font-size: 12.0pt;">New Vision<o:p></o:p></span></b></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt;"><br /></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt;"><i><span style="font-family: &quot;Arial&quot;,sans-serif; font-size: 12.0pt;">Desc: Eta and Chester go to Chesters' house; and she has another dream. This dream is of a bomb at the parade. <o:p></o:p></span></i></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt;"><br /></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><br /></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Chester is giving them the grand tour. “Kitchen is through the left there, there is a Kurieg there, if you drink coffee. There's also a latte wand if you are the frills type coffee drinker.”<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Ash is following just behind her, she can feel his warmth. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">“Nope, not going there. Get a grip girl.” She said under her breath.<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Chester pointed to a big room just off the landing, “The movie theater is set up with a touch screen display, just scroll through the movie you want to see.” <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">“Wait…” Eta said, “Did you say movie theater?”<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">“Yes I did.” Chester shrugged, “If you close the doors you can turn the volume up as loud as you want it. It's totally sound proof from the rest of the house." He smiled big about that one. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">“Some house you got here Chester.” Ash threw a glance at her, eyebrows raised.<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">“Thanks, follow me.”<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Heading up the stairs, then down the hall to the right, they passed several doors. Pointing to Ash, "You can take the first door on the left, and Eta, you can take the next one. Just so you know, my working hours are just starting, so I'll most likely be asleep when you two wake up. The house is yours. I’m usually up about mid-morning to noon. If you need a computer there is a guest computer in the living room. I'll let you get settled, I'll be in my office on the third floor if anyone needs me." He nodded, and headed up the second flight of stairs.<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"Who is this guy?" Eta said.<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"I don't know… but I think we signed up for the wrong career." Ash said. "I'll see you in the morning". <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Eta nodded, and then headed to her room. Suite, was more like it. It had its own bathtub with jets, and empty walk-in closet. She put her bag on the chaise, went to bed. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">***<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Suddenly, she was not in the room anymore. She was floating above the house. The wind was whipping through her. She wanted to see closer to the ground, and found her self floating toward the directino her eye had been looking. At ground level, the light was still on in the house. Chester was working on something. She thought of Ash, and found herself floating through the windows, doors, walls, and into his room. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Ash was sitting on a chair, by the window. His hand under his chin, as he stared outside. He seemed to be lost in thought. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">An image filled her mind. A tower. Then she was whisked away from the house, and went flying through the air. She was passing over houses at sonic speads. No need to put her arms out like superwoman, she was just along for the ride. As her flight slowed, she came upon a gated compound. There was a manicured entrance, and private secruity. Multiple buildings on the property, but the most interesting was a large tower, 13 stories tall. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">At the top of the tower, a light was on through a corner window. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Eta floated to the top of the building, and saw a man with white hair, typing into a computer. He turned and looked in her direction, but he didn't see her. He just stared outside while he spoke into his bluetooth headset. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Floating down, and then backward, she was hurled through the night, back into her room. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">***<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">It's getting worse... these visions... she needs answers. But this one, it was different. It was real, raw.<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Glancing at the clock, it's 11:02 am. She over slept. I guess overslept is an understatement when you have no plans, but she felt like it was over sleeping. She dressed in a hurry and worked her way down the hall. The smell of food carried her down the stairs and around the corner. Ash was flipping pancakes and stirring sausage. Chester was sitting at the counter talking… then he turned around to see Eta walk in. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"Hey. I'm not normally awake this early, but Ash discovered cookware in my kitchen, and I followed the scent down stairs. I didn't even know that stuff was in there!" <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"I'm glad he found it, I'm starving." Eta gave a nod to Chester, and sat down at one of the bar stools. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Ash turned to her, "You ok Slugger? I heard you tossing and turning a bit last night. It was fitful enough I could hear it from next door." <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"Yeah, I'm alright… but…"<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Ash turned around. "What is it?" <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"I had another one." <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"Really? What about this time?"<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Eta glanced at Chester and hesitated.<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"It's ok…I trust him. I had a buddy run a background on our friend here. No offense Chester." Chester smiled and waived, mouth full of coffee, "And it turns out that Chester's security clearance is almost as high as ours"<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Eta gave Ash a glance. "OK, what do you do? Exactly, I mean?"<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"A little of this, a little of that." Chester laughed. "Here's the thing." Chester pulls out his business card and hands it to Eta. "Internet Data and Program Security Analyst - Chester Jandihar IDAPSA".<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"Wow", she says, handing it to Ash.<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"Yeah, it's a mouthful. But CEO's get all freaked out when you call yourself a Hacker, so the business title makes them feel better. Basically, I design programs of various kinds for businesses, non-profits, even the government. I also test systems for vulnerabilities and report my findings. Then in my free time I just build random stuff, programs mostly." Chester shrugged, "So as I said, a little of this, and little of that." <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Ash smiles, "He's consulted for the N.S.A."<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Eta raised an eyebrow in disbelief. "If you say so…" Eta began to recant the visions she'd been having to catch Chester up to speed. Then the most recent vision, detail for detail, as best as she could remember it. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"You must think we're both nuts… huh?" Eta turned to Chester. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"Actually." Chester mused, "I find this fascinating. We've been studying this kind of phenomenon for years." <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"You have?" Eta turned to give her full attention to Chester now. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Chester pulled up his tablet, and starting scrolling through files. "I've worked on a lot of wicked crazy projects, but some of them have been about the kinds of experiences you two are talking about. This one…" Chester handed the tablet to Eta who scrolled through the site. "… for example. The Esion Eti'hw Institute &amp; Research Facility. They pronounce that second word like Et-Eew. I built some seriously intense stuff for them. They're just the kind of people who dabble in your experiences. I wouldn't use them though, they give me the heebeegeebees. Especially that main guy… what's his name.Thaddeus. I finally turned the project over to some eager MIT brats. I couldn't work with them anymore."<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"What kinds of projects? What's the research-" Eta took a quick breath. "The tower." <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"Yeah," Chester pointed to the picture, "that's their pride and joy there. Esion Tower." <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"No, you don't understand, my vision, I was at that tower last night." She recounted her vision to them.<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"The white haired man had to be this guy" Chester took the tablet, navigated to the about page, and handed it back. "Thaddeus J. B. Rotcudnoc, say that ten times fast." he laughed.<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Eta pulled up the About page and read the first line. "Have you ever wondered what is just beyond this world? Have you thought there had to be more? Religion and Spiritualists have let you down? Turn to science. Our work in quantam mechanics and extra deminsional evolution, is providing solid scienctific answers to many of life's olderst questions. The Esion Eti'hw Institute was founded on the ground breaking principals outlined in the thesis 'Unlocking the Extra-Normal Mind. A study of the human mind’s unlocked potential', By Dr. Richard T. Briar." Sounds freaky, just like the rest of the kooks I've been reading about the last few weeks. "<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"Wait… did you say Dr. Briar? Let me see that." Ash grabbed the tablet out her hand. He scrolled to the bottom and stopped. His brow furrowed, and lips pursed. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"What's the problem? You look like you've been punched." Eta observed. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"The night before the attack, this guy sat across from me at the coffee shop. He was asking a bunch of weird questions about the encounter with the homeless guy. It was almost as if he knew I had seen something, but I just passed it off as though it was nothing. I had forgotten about him until just now."<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"So, you have strange encounter where you see something that wasn't there, theoretically…" Chester interjected, "… then this guy shows up asking questions. Then that night you are attacked by assassins. Yep, I knew that place gave me the creeps." <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Eta could feel her skin tighten, and the hair on the back of her neck stand up. "So what does this mean?"<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"I have no idea, but I need to get some answers. I'm going to do some field reconniasance. You two be alright for a few hours?" <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"Sure," Eta said. "I'll clean my guns. I have a feeling I'll be needing them." <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"Cool! You can set that up here on the counter. I'll start checking out what I can about this institute, see what they've been up to since I stopped working with them. See? I knew I was here for a reason." Chester grinned. He was cute kid.<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><br /></div><div align="center" class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; text-align: center;"><b><span style="font-family: &quot;Arial&quot;,sans-serif; font-size: 12.0pt;">***<o:p></o:p></span></b></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt;"><br /></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt;"><b><span style="font-family: &quot;Arial&quot;,sans-serif; font-size: 12.0pt;">Ash's reaction to meeting Chester<o:p></o:p></span></b></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt;"><br /></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt;"><i><span style="font-family: &quot;Arial&quot;,sans-serif; font-size: 12.0pt;">Desc: Ash<o:p></o:p></span></i></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt;"><i><span style="font-family: &quot;Arial&quot;,sans-serif; font-size: 12.0pt;">He heads out to scout out the towers, and do some field work.<o:p></o:p></span></i></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt;"><br /></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt;"><br /></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Ash drove the Vulcan to a military surplus store, and restocked a few items he thought he would need. He picked up two uniforms to match the secuirty in the website photos. Then he turned the bike north onto the I-10, and headed to Santa Monica. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">On the way, Ash could not get the vision of the large man behind Chester out of his mind. The things he often saw on people, the medication he'd been taking for halucinations. Now it turns out he might not be crazy after all? Or maybe he still was. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><br /></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">***** Ash needs to have a sighting here, and it needs to urge him on.*****<o:p></o:p></span></div><div align="center" class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; text-align: center;"><b><span style="font-family: &quot;Arial&quot;,sans-serif; font-size: 12.0pt;">***<o:p></o:p></span></b></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt;"><br /></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt;"><b><span style="font-family: &quot;Arial&quot;,sans-serif; font-size: 12.0pt;">The Orphanage<o:p></o:p></span></b></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt;"><br /></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt;"><i><span style="font-family: &quot;Arial&quot;,sans-serif; font-size: 12.0pt;">Desc: Eta tags along to an Orphanage, where a child prophecies her future, and confirms the bomb is real.<o:p></o:p></span></i></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt;"><br /></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><br /></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><br /></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">"I have an appointment to make, and this program will take a few hours to run." Chester took his last sip of Mountain Dew, and threw the bottle in the trash can. "You are welcome to stay here and get some rest. Or, you can come along if you'd like."<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Eta glanced at the code running in the background. "Sure" With a nod, she left a note for Ash, and they grabbed their coats and headed out the door. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">In the car Chester rambled on and on about this Orphanage they were going to. "Ms. Wu is one of the most inspiring people I've ever met. She was raised in mainland China. She was a second child, but her parents refused to abort her, so she lived without honor or privilege. Eventually, when she was 15, he parents sent her to the USA hoping for a better life. She was mistreated by her "tour guides", but eventually broke free. Now she runs an Orphanage here in L.A." <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Chester nodded to the building. It was a nice place for being an Orphanage. It looked more like a private university campus. "She takes the ones that no one else will take. Many of her kids will spend the rest of their childhoods here, some the rest of their lives."<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">They parked, and walked in. The entrance was beautiful, laid with quality white tile, and a marble receptionist’s desk. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">"Hey Ellaine", Chester waived to the young lady, who couldn't have been more than 17. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">She nodded, and smiled, but then turned back to her telephone. "Yes sir, and what is the address?" <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Chester led her to the common room. A library ran the length of one wall, with seating areas to read. There were cubicle style desks with computers, and a separate area room to the side for games. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">A woman walked in from an adjacent office, "Peter." she said to a young man with a hoodie. "Did you complete your homework before turning on the game?" <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">"Yes Ms. Wu." <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">"Show me..."<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">"Um... " the kid fidgeted, "I'll go get that started right now Ms. Wu." <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">"Good boy." <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Chester pointed to the boy as he left, "That kid has been through 14 foster homes, and he's 16. There is almost no chance he could be adopted anywhere now. But Ms. Wu keeps him in line, and he's been showing great improvement, he just needed to have someone show him love and discipline." <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">"How did you find this place?" Eta asked.<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">"Well..." Chester smiled, "I was given a list of places I could use to fulfill community service, and I threw darts at the wall. The first one stuck on this place. What I didn't know, was how much Ms. Wu would mean to me. She treated me like one of her troubled kids, and she was just as tough on me as them." <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">"Ms. Wu, Good to see you." Chester said as the woman approached. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">She was small, maybe 4'9"? It was hard to say, but she looked like she was in her late 60's. After some introductions, Ms. Wu turned to Eta, "Dear, I need this young man for a few minutes to fix my computers. These kids keep downloading things. Would you be willing to wait here?" Eta nodded in the affirmative. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Eta walked over to the book shelves and glanced at the titles. They seemed to have everything from Honors World History to Sesame Street. Eta grabbed a book on US History that had pictures, and sat down in a nearby chair. She put her feet up on the ottoman, and leafed through the pictures.<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">After a few minutes, a young girl walked by to the book shelf and sat down next to her.<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">"Your pretty" she said, not looking up from her book. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Her speech was odd. Not down syndrome, but maybe Autism, Eta thought. "Thank you" Eta replied. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">"You have dreams..." The kid said.<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">A little taken back, "Yes, most people do. Do you have dreams?" trying to make conversation. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">"Yes..." not looking up from her book, "... but not like yours. Yours come true." <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Eta was not sure how to respond, she just stared at the girl for what felt like an eternity. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">"You need to stop him. That tower scary.” The girl stood up, and walked away with her book. <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;">Chester walked up behind her, “She another one that cannot be adopted.” <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><br /></div><div align="center" class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; text-align: center;"><b><span style="font-family: &quot;Arial&quot;,sans-serif; font-size: 12.0pt;">***<o:p></o:p></span></b></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt;"><br /></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt;"><b><span style="font-family: &quot;Arial&quot;,sans-serif; font-size: 12.0pt;">The Plan<o:p></o:p></span></b></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt;"><br /></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt;"><i><span style="font-family: &quot;Arial&quot;,sans-serif; font-size: 12.0pt;">Desc: Chester gets into the institute, and discovers the next key for Ash and Eta to solve. <o:p></o:p></span></i></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt;"><br /></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt;"><br /></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt;"><i><span style="font-family: &quot;Arial&quot;,sans-serif; font-size: 12.0pt;">Notes: suddenly, she was not in the room anymore. She was floating again. Above a crowd. Hundreds of people below. Large balloons in familiar shapes were passing by. On her far right, Santa Clause was coming down the road in a fake sleigh with plastic reindeer. <o:p></o:p></span></i></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt;"><br /></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="margin-bottom: 0.0001pt; text-align: justify; text-indent: 4pt;"><br /></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Back at the house, </span><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Chester was working on one side of the counter, and Eta sat on the other side.<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"You know the problem with these MIT brats?" Chester smirked. "They are way too sure of themselves. They are so convinced that they're the smartest kid in the room, and everyone has to answer to them. They've never had to make it on their own, or do their own work. They get sloppy in their life, and sloppy in their code. And that's how I got in." <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"Chester… if you don't mind me asking…" Eta kept her head down clearing the barrel of her Barretta 9mm. "How does someone with your obvious talent end up teaching computers for dummies at a homeless shelter, and hanging out with orphans? <o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">"Well, it's a long story, but not I'm not sure it's a terribly interesting one... I was one of the youngest graduates of Caltech to date, I was working with a major IT firm all bright eyed, ready to change the world. Then I started to realize that all I was doing was making really ugly people a lot of money. So I started drinking, then came the drugs.<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Soon I couldn't code anymore so I lost my job. My parents couldn't bare the fact their son turned into an addict, so they stopped returning my telephone calls. I ended up doing things I'd rather forget."<o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 115%; margin-bottom: 1.0pt; mso-layout-grid-align: none; mso-pagination: none; text-align: justify; text-autospace: none; text-indent: 4.0pt; text-justify: inter-ideograph;"><span lang="EN" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt; line-height: 115%;">Chester paused for a sip of coffee… "One day, standing in front of a judge I was told I could take jail or A.A plus community service. So, I chose A.A. and service. I had nowhere to go, but a guy at one of the meetings told me about the Union Gospel Mission. So I stayed there… every night for months. After a while I started to notice how badly the place needed new computers, but couldn't budget them in.
